title: agrostis stolonifera
intro: Agrostis stolonifera, commonly known as creeping bentgrass or colonial bent, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Agrostis stolonifera are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
